tweet: @HCSOTexas @Arkema_Inc @arkema .@Arkema_Inc Pressure release valves on containers. The popping is from the pressure release. They have no one on ground.

tweet: @HCSOTexas Anything can happen, so @HCSOTexas is being cautious. Plan is in place if situation escalates. Technical definition does not meet explosion.

tweet: @HCSOTexas Watching where smoke may go. Evacuation zone is more than adequate.
